discussion_comments.comment_body: This is repeated from above, please move them into a different variable, so we only need to adjust in one place.
This is also duplicated, combine to a function?
Please use string template, so it's more readable.
Minor note: adding blank lines between imports (when not required) can confuse auto-import formatting tools, since they interpret the spacing as intentional grouping.

Where does this 11 come from?
Avoid magic numbers
The number 11 comes from `MAX_SECTIONS - 1` (12 - 1), where  MAX_SECTIONS corresponds to `THEME_COLOR_LIMIT` in the theme configuration.
Then please use those constants here instead of 11.
Otherwise if someone increases MAX_SECTIONS, this 11 won't be changed.
What is `22.328125`, please avoid magic numbers.
